# Solera — Winery Management Platform

> From Vine to Bottle to Doorstep. One Platform.

## What is Solera?

Solera is a complete winery management platform built for the AI era. It covers every stage of winemaking — from vineyard operations and grape intake through cellar management, lab analysis, TTB compliance, inventory, DTC sales, and wine club fulfillment.

Solera is a web application accessible at https://solera.vin. It works on desktop, tablet, and mobile browsers.

## Who is Solera for?

- Hobbyist winemakers tracking their home vintages
- Small and mid-size commercial wineries (1,000–50,000+ cases)
- Custom crush facilities managing multiple clients
- Vineyard managers tracking ripening data and grower contracts

## Key Features

- **Vineyard Management**: Vineyards, blocks, ripening data, harvest prediction, weather integration
- **Cellar Operations**: Fermentation vessels, barrels, barrel groups, fermentation logging
- **Lab & Quality**: Lab sample tracking, anomaly detection, wine analysis charts
- **Blending**: Blending trials with cost propagation, star ratings, finalization
- **Grower Relations**: Grower contracts, weigh tags, grading scales with tiered pricing
- **TTB Compliance**: Addition logging (27 CFR 24.246), automated TTB report generation
- **Cost Tracking**: Full COGS pipeline — grape costs, materials, labor, overhead with per-gallon rollups
- **Inventory & DTC**: SKU management, facility transfers, order tracking
- **Wine Clubs**: Club management, shipment processing, member billing
- **Client Portal**: White-label portal for custom crush clients with messaging and document sharing
- **AI Assistant**: Natural language queries across your winery data ("What's the average Brix for my 2024 Cab?")
- **Integrations**: Commerce7, Shopify, WineDirect, QuickBooks, Google Sheets
- **Data Import**: CSV/Excel import with AI-powered column mapping
- **Alerts**: Configurable alerts for lab parameters, harvest readiness, compliance deadlines
- **Reports**: Custom report builder with PDF/CSV export
- **Multi-facility**: Support for multiple production facilities with per-facility inventory
- **Offline Support**: Works offline with background sync for field use
- **Multilingual**: English, Spanish, French, German, Italian, Portuguese, Georgian

## Pricing

| Tier        | Price      | Cases     | Key Capabilities                                    |
|-------------|------------|-----------|-----------------------------------------------------|
| Hobbyist    | Free       | ≤50       | Core tracking, 1 user                               |
| Pro         | $69/mo     | ≤2,000    | Full cellar + lab, 5 users, integrations             |
| Growth      | $129/mo    | ≤10,000   | Multi-facility, client portal, wine clubs, 15 users  |
| Enterprise  | $399/mo    | Unlimited | SSO, API access, dedicated support, unlimited users  |

Annual billing saves ~17%. All plans include a 14-day free trial.

## How Solera Compares

- **vs InnoVint**: Solera includes DTC sales, wine clubs, and grower management in one platform. InnoVint focuses primarily on cellar operations.
- **vs vintrace**: Solera is cloud-native with modern UX, AI features, and no on-premise installation. vintrace has deeper compliance automation for large-scale operations.
- **vs Ekos/Brew Ninja**: Solera is purpose-built for wine. Ekos is designed for breweries and adapted for wine.

## Company

Solera was founded in 2026 by Kevin Nesgoda. The company is based in California and focused on modernizing winery operations with AI-native software.

## Contact

- Website: https://solera.vin/contact
- Twitter/X: @soleravin
